# ttd export

Write entries to CSV, JSON, XLSX, or Apple Numbers. See [Import & export](../../guides/import-export.md) and the [interchange format reference](../interchange-format.md).

```console
ttd export [OPTIONS] PATH
```

Export entries (csv, json, xlsx, or Apple Numbers).

**Parameters**:

* `PATH, --path`: Output file; format inferred from extension  **\[required\]**
* `--format, -f`:
* `--project, -p`:
* `--client`:
* `--from`:
* `--to`:
* `--invoiced, --uninvoiced`: Only (un)billed entries
